✦ The A–Z Journey ✦

What's Inside

Everything Your Little One Needs to Learn & Play

🎨
Color Kawaii Characters
Each fruit and veggie has its own adorable kawaii face — perfect for colouring with crayons, markers, or colored pencils.
✏️
Trace Every Letter
Dotted uppercase and lowercase letters guide little hands through proper letter formation — building confidence one stroke at a time.
🔢
Count Along
Counting activities reinforce number recognition — sneak in a little maths alongside all the alphabet fun!
⭐
Ages 3 and Up
Designed for preschool and kindergarten readiness — simple enough for brand-new learners, engaging for curious minds at every stage.
📚 Activity Book · Ages 3+

Kawaii Alphabet Adventures
Fruits & Veggies

A full A-to-Z coloring, tracing, and counting adventure featuring 26 lovingly drawn kawaii fruit and veggie characters. Perfect for little learners who love cute things — and the grown-ups who want learning to feel like play.

🎨 Color ✏️ Trace 🔢 Count 📖 26 Letters 👶 Ages 3+ 🇺🇸 Amazon US 🇨🇦 Amazon CA
